title: Upgraded Tools
description: Add hammers that act as swords, axes, picks, shovels and hoes combined (Thor approves this paxel)
body:
Please use the Modrinth download and do not rehost the files. This mod may be used in any modpacks. (On Modrinth) No plan for fabric version at this time, sorry.

DESCRIPTION


Add hammers that act as swords, axes, picks, shovels and hoes combined. Compatible with Upgraded Netherite/Ultimerite

ENCHANTMENT


Hammer Time (Hammer only)(1.19.2-2.1.0.2+)

Hammer Time I : 3x3x1 Mining & Increase Mining speed by 20% Hammer Time II : 3x3x2 Mining & Increase Mining speed by 30% Hammer Time III : 3x3x3 Mining & Increase Mining speed by 40% Mining speed is increased only if 2 or more blocks are mined.

Upgraded Nethrite
Adds upgraded versions of Netherite with helpful effects.
Upgraded Netherite : Items
Adds some items like apples and totems to the Upgraded Netherite mod.
Upgraded Netherite : Ultimerite
Adds Ultimerite Tier to the Upgraded Netherite mod.
